subcodes.first_line: The ocean of praise and thanksgiving beseemeth the Lord of Names, Who hath graciously brought the world into existence and adorned it with the ornament of nations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بحر حمد و ثنا مالک اسما را لایق و سزا که عالم را وجود عطا فرمود و بطراز امم
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @law of pilgrimage, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement
